sub_modules.fp_unpack: Extracts sign, exponent, fraction, and classification bits for both operands.
sub_modules.fp_special: Handles NaN, infinity, and zero special-case results and flags.
sub_modules.fp_align: Builds hidden-bit significands, selects the larger magnitude operand, aligns the smaller significand, and preserves sticky information.
sub_modules.fp_addsub: Performs signed significand addition or subtraction after alignment.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round: Normalizes the arithmetic result, applies the selected rounding mode, packs the floating-point result, and generates exception flags.
